_comment: Place this file at rbac-config/configs/prod/roles/my-service.json. 'system' roles are seeded into every tenant automatically. 'platform_default' roles are assigned to all principals by default. 'admin_default' roles are assigned to org admins. Bump 'version' whenever you change the role — the RBAC service uses version to detect updates.

roles.name: My Service Administrator
roles.description: Perform any available operation on any My Service resource.

roles.name: My Service Resource Editor
roles.description: Create, update, and delete My Service resources.
